title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Newgen Software

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Newgen Software
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Newgen Software. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Lucknow-based team.

About Newgen Software:
Newgen Software is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Newgen Software!
